artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- generate-m5-baseline --output evidence/m5/m5-baseline.json
notes: Carries M4 partial-proof blockers into a machine-readable M5 baseline while keeping M5 status READY.

artifacts.source_command: manual: define EP-001 M6 decision thresholds, validated by terminal-cli validate-m5-go-no-go
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Maintainer-authored decision policy; validator enforces schema, required outcomes and measurable criteria.
notes: Names host replacement experiment, public pre-release packaging and another compatibility hardening milestone.

artifacts.source_command: manual: render EP-001 baseline, evidence manifest contract and go/no-go thresholds
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Reader-facing policy document derived from machine-readable M5 JSON artifacts.
notes: Documents missing-source behavior and public artifact privacy rules.

artifacts.source_command: manual: author EP-002 compatibility matrix, validated by cargo run -p terminal-cli -- validate-m5-compatibility evidence/m5/compatibility-matrix.json
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Maintainer-authored compatibility matrix; validator enforces schema, fixture links and source references.
notes: Contains 18 pass rows and one out-of-scope row for M5 EP-002.

artifacts.source_command: manual: render M5 compatibility summary from evidence/m5/compatibility-matrix.json
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Reader-facing document derived from the validated M5 compatibility matrix.
notes: Documents pass percentage, deferred-row policy and EP-002 fixture-backed rows.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- generate-m5-replay-derivatives --output-dir crates/terminal-fixtures/fixtures/m5-replay
notes: Scrubbed Codex CLI derivative with command shape preserved and raw prompts, local paths and tokens omitted.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- generate-m5-replay-derivatives --output-dir crates/terminal-fixtures/fixtures/m5-replay
notes: Scrubbed Claude Code derivative with command shape preserved and raw prompts, local paths and tokens omitted.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- generate-m5-replay-derivatives --output-dir crates/terminal-fixtures/fixtures/m5-replay
notes: Synthetic public rapid-output workload used by M5 replay verification.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- generate-m5-replay-derivatives --output-dir crates/terminal-fixtures/fixtures/m5-replay
notes: Synthetic public 100k-line workload records discarded rows and Hera-owned scrollback bytes.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- verify-m5-replay crates/terminal-fixtures/fixtures/m5-replay --json-output evidence/m5/m5-replay-verification.json
notes: Verifies four M5 replay fixtures twice, including Codex, Claude Code, rapid-output and 100k-line scenarios.

artifacts.source_command: manual: PANEFLOW_HERA_DOGFOOD=shadow PANEFLOW_HERA_DOGFOOD_RETENTION=raw_local PANEFLOW_IPC_SCRIPTING=1 target/debug/paneflow.exe; workspace.up two scripted panes; summarize live mismatch reports
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Requires a live Paneflow GPUI session with feature-gated Hera dogfood enabled; raw local mismatch artifacts are intentionally retained outside Hera.
notes: Records the failed 2026-07-07 live Paneflow shadow rerun and links only scrubbed public mismatch summaries.

artifacts.source_command: manual: summarize scrubbed fields from the 2026-07-07 isolated live Paneflow shadow dogfood rerun
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Summarizes local-only live GPUI mismatch JSON that must stay outside the Hera repository.
notes: Contains only field paths, counts, dimensions and sanitized mismatch categories from the isolated live rerun.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- measure-m5-platform --json-output evidence/m5/platform-runtime-evidence.json
notes: Records the EP-004 required command set for Windows, Linux and macOS, with non-current platforms blocked instead of inferred.

artifacts.source_command: manual: render EP-004 platform runner command set and validation policy
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Reader-facing document derived from the platform evidence schema and checked-in artifact.
notes: Documents that Linux and macOS remain blocked until measured directly.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- generate-m5-package-readiness --output evidence/m5/m5-package-readiness.json --release-plan-output evidence/m5/m5-release-plan.json
notes: Records manifest metadata, docs.rs policy and package dry-run results for all intended public Hera crates.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- generate-m5-package-readiness --output evidence/m5/m5-package-readiness.json --release-plan-output evidence/m5/m5-release-plan.json
notes: Orders public crate dry-runs so dependencies appear before dependents and keeps cargo publish out of scope.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- generate-m5-api-audit --output evidence/m5/m5-api-audit.json
notes: Records public API boundary checks and blocked cargo-semver-checks coverage for EP-005.

artifacts.source_command: cargo run -p terminal-cli -- generate-m5-security-baseline --output evidence/m5/m5-security-baseline.json
notes: Records cargo-audit, cargo-deny and OpenSSF Scorecard posture for EP-006.
Current local run blocks release hardening because cargo-audit and Scorecard are unavailable and cargo-deny fails without an explicit license policy.

artifacts.source_command: manual: render EP-005 package readiness, release plan and API audit evidence
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Reader-facing document derived from validated EP-005 JSON artifacts.
notes: Explains why public pre-release packaging remains blocked while metadata, docs.rs policy and API boundaries now have evidence.

artifacts.source_command: manual: update M5 final report from baseline, compatibility, replay, dogfood, platform, package, API and security artifacts
artifacts.non_reproducible_reason: Report is authored from validated M5 evidence artifacts and records the final EP-006 recommendation.
notes: Captures the final M5 verdict: host replacement and public pre-release packaging remain blocked; another compatibility and release hardening milestone is recommended.
